programme.title: Dirty Dollars Inc.
programme.desc: Arms trafficking fuels $870B crime market; weapons from legal trade lack transparency.

programme.title: Dirty Dollars Inc.
programme.desc: Organized crime earns ~$870B yearly; fake medicines exploit gaps, causing 700k deaths.

programme.title: The Unperfect Crime
programme.desc: The story of the serio-comic 1997 Loomis-Fargo armoured heist and its bumbling underdog perpetrators.

programme.title: Stories of the Loomis Gang
programme.desc: The story of Central New York's first and potentially most brutal crime family follows a single man

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: Alphonse Gabriel Capone, was a notorious gangster who ruled an empire of crime in the Roaring Twenties

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney meets Glasgow's first godfather of crime, Walter Norval.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernie chats with three of the members of the Quality Street Gang.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: England's capital gives Bernie the chance to meet numerous 'faces' that have shaped London's past.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Billy Robinson, a man who recruits every villain in Newcastle.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernie talks to Danny Woollard and Angelo "Festus" Hayman, who carried out the Snow Hill Robbery.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernie attempts to answer an age-old question.

programme.title: Code Of Silence - Trail Of Murder
programme.desc: A documentary about the Boston Bandits gang in the 1990’s known for armored car and bank robberies.

programme.title: Cia Drugs R Us! A Drugs As Weapons... Sequel
programme.desc: Links CIA's MK-Ultra, drugs, and U.S. intel to artists, activists, and major scandals.

programme.title: Pablo Escobar - The Columbian Cartel King
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar, born in 1949, was raised in urban poverty in Medellin, Colombia.

programme.title: Sugar Wars
programme.desc: This documentary tells the story of Angelo Lonardo and the Cleveland Mafia in which he was part of.

programme.title: Jack the Ripper: The Case Reopened
programme.desc: A documentary which casts new light on the Jack the Ripper case.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid in two cases: Daigle's pool hall vanishing and NJ teen's suspect-linked disappearance.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid NJ and New Orleans murder cases, revealing truths and clearing key suspects.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help solve IL teen's abduction, NJ serial stabbings, aiding in tracking the killers.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid CA mom's murder case, NJ mom tracks kids taken by ex who evades psychic visions.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: Transgender teenager Mercedes Williamson is murdered by her boyfriend.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: In Mississippi, a black man is murdered in a hate crime perpetrated by a group of white teenagers.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: A man breaks into the apartment of a married couple and opens fire while wearing a camera.

programme.title: Dangerous Company
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the seedy and extremely dangerous life of an international trafficker.

programme.desc: Mark David Chapman, a disgruntled security guard, becomes obsessed with "The Catcher in the Rye"
